title: Extra line
description: Add one more main-program line so short strategies fit more comfortably.

title: Extra portal split
description: Every portal split creates one extra child ball on top of the usual result.

title: Queue peek
description: Preview the next 3 ball types instead of only the next 1.

title: Center bin bonus
description: If a `center_ball` lands in the middle bucket, it earns an extra +5 points.

title: Helper buffer
description: Give the helper editor two extra lines for a longer reusable tactic.

title: Portal chain
description: Balls created by a portal split may trigger one more portal split if they reach a portal again.
